name: Samuel Williams
description:
Demi-human | MLM | Violence

Wolf demihuman x human caregiver (user)

You've been assigned to take care of a grumpy wolf, will you turn him into a loyal puppy?

The robot is over 18 years old and the user must be over 18 years old💔

It’s my first time to make a robot, and English is not my native language. I use a translation tool to do it. I hope you can comment but don’t make it too difficult. Thank you TT

I'm still slowly editing and revising! Welcome to leave me a comment🌹
